para_trans: The Ministerial Cell Officer Cadre
Transfer of officer
Mr. Mithun Mohd. Salunkhe, Room Officer
Government of Maharashtra
the General Administration Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO.: CAB-1026 / P.No.30 / PRASH-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032
Date: May 19, 2026
the Government Order
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
As per Section 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, the following are mentioned:
An inter-departmental transfer is made for administrative reasons of a room officer in a ministerial department.
He is being transferred and posted in the section shown in column-5 in front of his name.
It is: -
2. Mr. Salunkhe dated 19.05.2026 (M. No.) to Rakana No. 4 Unilateral from the section mentioned here
is being released.
3. The order is an order of superannuation and the department concerned may issue fresh orders.
There's no need.
4. Direct or indirect pressure by transferred officers to cancel their transfer.
If brought, the actions of the concerned will be considered misconduct.
5. In the Government Circular No. Annexure-2022 / Q. No. 45/18 (R.V.C.), dated 25.08.2022
As mentioned, it is mandatory for the concerned cell officer to provide a transfer of charge certificate.
6. Information about the Department of Parliamentary Affairs joining the Cell Officer Department.
Submit to S.P.V. / (Question-2).
